name: Rice Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onion in butter until tender.
2. Add rice; sauté 3 minutes. Stir in broth and parsley; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 20 minutes. Cool for 30 minutes.
4. Stir in egg, cheese, basil, and pepper.
5. Moisten hands with water. Shape mixture into logs about 1/4 cup each.
6. Roll logs in bread crumbs.
7. Heat oil in an electric skillet to 365°F (185°C).
8. Fry croquettes a few at a time for 3-4 minutes or until crisp and golden, turning often.
9. Drain on paper towels. Garnish with parsley if desired.
